- document:
  - table:
    - rowgroup:
      - row "Hacker Newsnew | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login":
        - cell "Hacker Newsnew | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login":
          - table:
            - rowgroup:
              - row "Hacker Newsnew | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login":
                - cell:
                  - link [ref=e1]:
                    - /url: https://news.ycombinator.com
                    - img [ref=e2]
                - cell "Hacker Newsnew | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit":
                  - link "Hacker News" [ref=e3]:
                    - /url: news
                  - link "new" [ref=e4]:
                    - /url: newest
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "past" [ref=e5]:
                    - /url: front
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "comments" [ref=e6]:
                    - /url: newcomments
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "ask" [ref=e7]:
                    - /url: ask
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "show" [ref=e8]:
                    - /url: show
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "jobs" [ref=e9]:
                    - /url: jobs
                  - text: "|"
                  - link "submit" [ref=e10]:
                    - /url: submit
                - cell "login":
                  - link "login" [ref=e11]:
                    - /url: login?goto=news
      - row
      - row:

          - table:
